title: Catamaran Rental in Benalmadena: Prices, Guide and Tips for 2026
html:
Catamaran rental in Benalmadena offers a spacious way to explore the Costa del Sol, with prices from around 1,200 EUR for a full-day charter departing from Puerto Marina. BoatHire24 connects you with verified listings for a stress-free booking experience.

How much does it cost to rent a catamaran in Benalmadena?

A full-day catamaran charter in Benalmadena typically costs between 1,200 EUR and 2,500 EUR, depending on the boat size and season. Shared catamaran tours are a cheaper option, starting from around 80 EUR per person for a half-day trip. Private charters for up to 12 guests often include a skipper, fuel, and refreshments. Always check the listing for what is included. You can explore the full range of day charters in Benalmadena to compare prices and features.

Where to set off in Benalmadena

Most catamaran rentals depart from Puerto Marina, the largest marina in Benalmadena, situated at the western end of the bay. Other departure points include the smaller Puerto Deportivo de Benalmadena and the nearby Puerto de la Bajadilla in Marbella for longer itineraries. Popular cruising grounds include the Bay of Benalmadena, the Costa del Sol coastline towards Fuengirola, and the picturesque Cala de Mijas. Some charters also visit the waters off Torremolinos or head towards Gibraltar for a full-day adventure. The sheltered waters around Cabo Pino are ideal for a relaxed sail.

Which boat to rent

  1. Lagoon 450 catamaran, best for group day charters with up to 12 guests; from 1,500 EUR for a full day.
  2. Shangani Blue Lagoon 70 ft, a luxury crewed catamaran ideal for weddings or corporate events, accommodating up to 20 guests; from 2,000 EUR. For full details, visit the Shangani Blue Lagoon 70 ft charter page.
  3. Azimut motorboat, a swift option for coastal tours, suitable for 8, 10 guests; from 800 EUR for a half day.
  4. Astondoa flybridge, a stylish motor yacht for up to 12 guests, with a sun deck and cabin; from 1,000 EUR for a half day.

Cost breakdown for boat rental in Benalmadena

  • Shared catamaran tour: from 80 EUR per person for a 3, 4 hour trip with a max of 12 guests.
  • Small motorboat half-day (up to 4 hours): from 350 EUR for a 6-metre boat.
  • Catamaran full-day (8 hours) private: from 1,200 EUR for a 40 ft Lagoon for 12 guests.
  • Crewed yacht with skipper: from 2,500 EUR for a 50 ft Azimut for a full day, including crew and lunch.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Benalmadena?

In Benalmadena, you need a valid boating licence for bareboat charters, but crewed rentals are licence-free. Spain requires the "Patrón de Navegación Básica" for boats up to 8 metres and inland waters; for larger vessels you need the "Patrón de Yate". However, most catamaran rentals in Benalmadena include a skipper by default, so you can enjoy the trip without a licence. The operator will confirm the exact requirements for each booking. BoatHire24 recommends confirming with the listing owner before paying.

If you book a crewed catamaran, ask the skipper to include a stop at the sea caves near Fuengirola, they are only accessible by boat and offer a unique swimming spot.

At a glance

  • Price range: 80, 2,500 EUR
  • Peak months: June, July, August, September
  • Trip length: 3 to 8 hours
  • Capacity: 6, 20 guests
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Benalmadena

Can I rent a catamaran for a party in Benalmadena?

Yes, many catamarans like the Shangani Blue Lagoon 70 ft are equipped for events with sound systems and spacious sundecks, and you can cater onboard.

What is the best month for catamaran rental in Benalmadena?

July and August offer calm seas and 30°C heat, but May and September give quieter anchorages and lower prices, making them ideal for a relaxed charter.

Do I need to tip the skipper in Benalmadena?

Tipping is appreciated but not mandatory; a standard amount is 10, 15% of the charter fee, particularly for exceptional service.

How far can I sail from Benalmadena in a day?

A full-day catamaran charter can cover up to 25 nautical miles, reaching spots like Cala de Mijas or the coast of Marbella and back.

Whether you are planning a family day out or a special celebration, renting a catamaran in Benalmadena through BoatHire24 ensures a seamless booking with verified boats. If you own a catamaran or motorboat in the region, consider signing up to become a host and earn from your vessel. Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Benalmadena and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
